outcome: a) Standardized wearable/BCI data ingestion framework
evidence: canonical schema = 13 required cols; 5 device converters (deap, emotiv, galea, omics, wesad); real EMOTIV ingested = 14-ch EEG; sentinel builders: prepare-cgmacros/diatrend/big-ideas; LSL streams eeg/wearable/reference_glucose

outcome: b) EEG and physiological embedding pipelines
evidence: real pretrained LaBraM loaded via from_pretrained() = True (200-d frozen EEG embedding; drives depression AUROC 0.961); physiological encoders: biosignal_adapter + cgm_adapter (CGM-history 17 feats via cgmacros_data)

outcome: c) Real-time stress and glucose monitoring capability
evidence: streamed 5 rt-demo-v1 frames: stress=True, glucose(+abstain)=True, BCI command=True; WS /v1/realtime/stream + SSE + LSL replay; glucose abstains honestly

outcome: d) Explainable neural and physiological biomarkers
evidence: per-prediction signed attributions present (top: ['time_above_range', 'cgm_std', 'hba1c']); grounded explainer (Claude/local, hallucination-guarded); EEG band/channel-importance biomarkers: ['channel_band_importance.png', 'channel_band_importance.png']

outcome: e) Personalized diabetes risk prediction models
evidence: per-patient personalization: NeuroGlycemicNet.forward consumes patient_index + seen_patient (new-vs-seen patient) = True; diabetes-risk outcomes ('diabetes_status', 'glucose_instability', 'diabetes_complication'); response-kernel personalizes the carb->glucose response per patient
